    Comment - Class in model
    Class that holds comments that can be assigned to issues

    commentIssue(Issue, Comment) - Method in class model.IssueManager

    createdAt - Variable in class model.Comment
    Date at which the comment was created
    createdAt - Variable in class model.Issue
    Timestamp indicating when the issue was created.
    createdOn - Variable in class model.User
    Timestamp when the user was created.
